item.title: Static Link vs Dynamic Link
item.author: Author
item.description: In this post, I would show the way to create static library and dynamic library and how they link to the executable files. I would not dig into the details of comparison, advantages, or disadvantages between static and dynamic library, please make sure you already have a whole picture before starting on this post. Create static library First, create a source file without main function as our library. Attention, filename should start from lib so that compiler can identify it as library file.
